import io
import string
import list

fn remove_at(_ xs: List<Int>, _ idx: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  let n = xs.len()
  while i < n
    if i != idx
      match xs.get(i)
      when Some(v)
        result = list.push(result, v)
      when None
        ()
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let toks = string.split_whitespace(s)
  mut i = 0
  let n = toks.len()
  while i < n
    match toks.get(i)
    when Some(t)
      match string.parse_int(t)
      when Some(v)
        result = list.push(result, v)
      when None
        ()
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn sort_desc(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut remaining = xs
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  while remaining.len() > 0
    match list.max(remaining)
    when Some(m)
      result = list.push(result, m)
      match list.index_of(remaining, m)
      when Some(i)
        remaining = remove_at(remaining, i)
      when None
        ()
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  result
end

let line1 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let line2 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let nums = parse_ints(line1)
let k = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
when Some(v)
  v
when None
  0
end

let sorted = sort_desc(nums)
let total = sorted.len()
let take = if k > total
  total
else
  k
end

mut out = ""
mut i = 0
while i < take
  match sorted.get(i)
  when Some(v)
    if i == 0
      out = "#{v}"
    else
      out = "#{out} #{v}"
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end
println(out)
